# Tool Reference

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/gen_tool_reference.py — do not edit by hand. -->

viznoir exposes **24 MCP tools**. Each renders or analyses simulation data and returns a PNG/glTF artifact or structured JSON.

## `analyze_data`

[DEPRECATED — use inspect_physics instead] Analyze VTK/simulation data.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `focus` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `domain` | string \| null |  |  |  |

## `animate`

Create an animation from time series data or camera orbit.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `field_name` | string | yes |  |  |
| `mode` | string |  | `timesteps` |  |
| `colormap` | string |  | `Cool to Warm` |  |
| `camera` | string |  | `isometric` |  |
| `fps` | integer |  | `24` |  |
| `time_range` | array \| null |  |  |  |
| `speed_factor` | number |  | `1.0` |  |
| `orbit_duration` | number |  | `10.0` |  |
| `width` | integer |  | `1920` |  |
| `height` | integer |  | `1080` |  |
| `files` | array \| null |  |  |  |
| `file_pattern` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `output_format` | string |  | `frames` |  |
| `video_quality` | integer |  | `23` |  |
| `text_overlay` | string \| null |  |  |  |

## `auto_postprocess`

Autonomous post-processing: inspect → visualize → evaluate → refine.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `goal` | string |  | `explore` |  |
| `max_iterations` | integer |  | `5` |  |

## `batch_render`

Render multiple fields from the same dataset in one call.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `fields` | array | yes |  |  |
| `colormap` | string |  | `Cool to Warm` |  |
| `camera` | string |  | `isometric` |  |
| `purpose` | string |  | `analyze` |  |
| `width` | integer \| null |  |  |  |
| `height` | integer \| null |  |  |  |
| `timestep` | number \| string \| null |  |  |  |
| `quality` | string |  | `standard` |  |

## `cinematic_render`

Cinematic-quality rendering with auto-framing, 3-point lighting, SSAO, and PBR.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `field_name` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `colormap` | string |  | `Cool to Warm` |  |
| `quality` | string |  | `standard` |  |
| `lighting` | string \| null |  | `cinematic` |  |
| `background` | string \| null |  | `dark_gradient` |  |
| `azimuth` | number \| null |  |  |  |
| `elevation` | number \| null |  |  |  |
| `fill_ratio` | number |  | `0.75` |  |
| `metallic` | number |  | `0.0` |  |
| `roughness` | number |  | `0.5` |  |
| `ground_plane` | boolean |  | `False` |  |
| `ssao` | boolean |  | `True` |  |
| `fxaa` | boolean |  | `True` |  |
| `width` | integer \| null |  |  |  |
| `height` | integer \| null |  |  |  |
| `scalar_range` | array \| null |  |  |  |
| `timestep` | number \| string \| null |  |  |  |
| `output_filename` | string |  | `cinematic.png` |  |

## `compare`

Compare two simulation results side-by-side or as a difference map.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_a` | string | yes |  |  |
| `file_b` | string | yes |  |  |
| `field_name` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `mode` | string |  | `side_by_side` |  |
| `colormap` | string |  | `Cool to Warm` |  |
| `quality` | string |  | `standard` |  |
| `purpose` | string |  | `analyze` |  |
| `width` | integer \| null |  |  |  |
| `height` | integer \| null |  |  |  |
| `scalar_range` | array \| null |  |  |  |
| `timestep` | number \| string \| null |  |  |  |
| `label_a` | string |  | `A` |  |
| `label_b` | string |  | `B` |  |
| `output_filename` | string |  | `compare.png` |  |

## `compose_assets`

Compose multiple assets into a deliverable format.

|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `assets` | array | yes |  |  |
| `layout` | string |  | `story` |  |
| `title` | string \| null |  |  |  |

| `height` | integer |  | `1080` |  |
| `scenes` | array \| null |  |  |  |
| `fps` | integer |  | `30` |  |

Execute a custom pipeline definition (advanced).

|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `pipeline` | object | yes |  |  |

## `extract_stats`

Extract statistical summary (min/max/mean/std) for fields.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `fields` | array | yes |  |  |
| `timestep` | number \| string \| null |  |  |  |
| `blocks` | array \| null |  |  |  |

## `inspect_data`

Inspect a simulation file and return metadata.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |

## `inspect_physics`

Extract structured physics data for AI storytelling.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `case_dir` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `fields` | array \| null |  |  |  |
| `probe_lines` | integer |  | `3` |  |
| `vortex_threshold` | number |  | `0.01` |  |

## `integrate_surface`

Integrate a field over a surface to compute forces, areas, or fluxes.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `field_name` | string | yes |  |  |
| `boundary` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `timestep` | number \| string \| null |  |  |  |

## `plot_over_line`

Sample field values along a line between two points.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `field_name` | string | yes |  |  |
| `point1` | array | yes |  |  |
| `point2` | array | yes |  |  |
| `resolution` | integer |  | `100` |  |
| `timestep` | number \| string \| null |  |  |  |

## `preview_3d`

Export dataset to glTF/glB for interactive 3D viewing in a browser.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `field_name` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `timestep` | number \| string \| null |  |  |  |
| `output_filename` | string |  | `preview.glb` |  |

## `probe_timeseries`

Sample a field value at a fixed point across timesteps.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |
| `field_name` | string | yes |  |  |
| `point` | array | yes |  |  |
| `files` | array \| null |  |  |  |
| `file_pattern` | string \| null |  |  |  |
| `time_range` | array \| null |  |  |  |

## `pv_isosurface`

Run DualSPHysics IsoSurface to generate VTK surface mesh files.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `bi4_dir` | string | yes |  |  |
| `output_dir` | string | yes |  |  |
| `vars` | string |  | `+vel,+press,+rhop` |  |
| `only_type` | string |  | `+fluid` |  |
| `docker_image` | string |  | `dsph-agent:latest` |  |

## `validate_render`

Physics-check a render spec against the data — pass/warn/fail + fixes.

|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `file_path` | string | yes |  |  |

## `volume_render`
